mapper.select: SELECT c.mentee_com_id AS menteeComId, c.mentee_com_content AS menteeComContent, TO_CHAR(c.mentee_com_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS menteeComDate, c.member_number AS memberNumber, c.menteeBoard_id AS menteeBoardId, m.member_id AS memberId, m.member_nickname AS memberNickname FROM UB_MENTEE_BOARD_COMMENT c JOIN UB_MEMBER m ON c.member_number = m.member_number WHERE c.menteeBoard_id = #{menteeBoardId} ORDER BY c.mentee_com_date ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT seq_mentee_board_comment.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO UB_MENTEE_BOARD_COMMENT (mentee_com_id, mentee_com_content, mentee_com_date, member_number, menteeBoard_id) VALUES (#{menteeComId}, #{menteeComContent}, SYSDATE, #{memberNumber}, #{menteeBoardId})
